name: Doll City - RPG
description:
Welcome to Doll City, your beautiful functional city in a doll world. Create your own story And with a bit of luck, get a job and a house...

This is my first bot in this style, I apologize if there are any mistakes. But I wanted to do something interesting and for some reason this topic really interested me ̄⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠ ̄.

Ps: My first language is not English, so I'm using the translator.

•I recommend having a "doll" persona or something similar for better immersion, but if you don't want to, feel free.
creator: Storyteller™
